allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix Railway deployment Node.js version requirement

Update Node.js version to 20 to meet Next.js 16.1.0 requirements. Railway was failing with Node.js 18.20.5, but Next.js requires >=20.9.0.

Changes:
- Add nodejs_20 to nixpacks.toml setup phase
- Add engines field to package.json specifying node >=20.9.0

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
